channel.title: TGaceAllStories
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from TGaceAllStories, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Gold prices tumble below $5,000 as China holidays dent support
item.description: Goldâs fragile hold on $5,000 an ounce gave way to selling on Tuesday.

item.title: Norwegian Cruise Line stock is rising. A big activist reportedly has taken a stake.
item.description: Norwegian Cruise Line shares rose on Tuesday after a report an activist investor has taken a stake and plans to shake up the struggling company.

item.title: Why has Kris Jennerâs $13.5 million âKeeping Up With the Kardashiansâ house sat on the market for over a year?
item.description: Kris Jenner listed the Hidden Hills home with much fanfare, but none of the hoopla appears to have moved the needle on the sale of the property.

item.description: Facebook billionaire Mark Zuckerberg has reportedly snapped up an extraordinary waterfront mansion on Miamiâs infamous Billionaire Bunker.

item.title: AI fears are hitting software stocks the hardest. Citi sees a buying opportunity in many names

item.title: Netflix and Amazon are among the most oversold stocks on Wall Street
item.description: Several big-name stocks got caught in this week's market sell-off, leaving some at levels that investors could take advantage of to reap future gains.
